full_text:
Liu Xun еҠүеҫӘ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xun (еҠүеҫӘ). Raised a force against Yuan Tan at Tayin. Liu Xun was affiliated with Yuan Tan.
